name: New England Clam Chowder
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the clams and set aside the liquid.
2. In a large pot, sauté the onions in butter until they are soft.
3. Add the diced potatoes and the reserved clam juice to the pot.
4. Cook the mixture until the potatoes are tender.
5. Stir in the remaining clams, half and half, and sherry (if using).
6. Heat the chowder gently and season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Do not allow the mixture to boil.
8. Serve and enjoy your New England Clam Chowder, which yields 4 servings.
